home.scamAlertText: The official Forge URL is forge.creditchain.org
home.scamAlertText2: Beware of online videos promoting "liquidity front runner bots"
home.learnEthPromoText: Check out tutorials on Forge, Solidity, CreditChain, and other EVM projects. Great for all skill levels.
